title: Trial ending - help
excerpt:

posts.author: scoobysnack (Christina McGuire)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our account says “You have 1 day left on your trial” - is this our local time? Does it mean today or tomorrow it wil expire? What will happen when the trial ends?

Been putting lots of stuff in and just waiting for our manager to add credit card details, and worrying that the account might suddently become inaccessible, and we lose everything that’s there. Should I start downloading ? And would it import back in with all the updates atached? And files?

Many thanks!

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would first reach out to support and ask for an extended trial.
But once your trial ends, you will lose access to your boards.

posts.author: jason.clark (jason clark)
posts.cookedHtml: @scoobysnack I worked for for a couple weeks past the trial. Support was happy to extend it.
